task_completion.description: Read the propeller layout specification document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., gedit, mousepad) or a terminal window (using cat/less) displaying the contents of 'dep_layout_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Open the baseline wing model in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenVSP application window open with a wing model visible in the 3D workspace, and the Geometry Browser showing the baseline wing component.

task_completion.description: Add 3 Propeller components to the model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenVSP Geometry Browser listing at least three 'Propeller' components added to the model tree.

task_completion.description: Configure the propellers to have the specified diameter and number of blades.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Propeller geometry configuration window (Design tab) showing 'Diameter' set to 0.8 and 'Num Blades' (or similar blade count field) set to 3.

task_completion.description: Position the propellers at the specified X, Y, and Z coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Propeller XForm/Location tab showing X Location = -0.4, Z Location = 0.0, and Y Location set to 1.5, 3.0, or 4.5 for the respective propellers.

task_completion.description: Enable planar symmetry so propellers appear on both semi-spans.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Symmetry tab in the Propeller dialog with Planar (XZ) symmetry checked, OR visually confirm in the 3D view that the propellers are mirrored on both the left and right sides of the wing.

task_completion.description: Save the updated model as dep_wing.vsp3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'dep_wing.vsp3' in the Documents/OpenVSP directory, or the OpenVSP main window title bar displaying 'dep_wing.vsp3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing active interaction with the OpenVSP graphical interface (clicking menus, editing fields in dialogs) rather than just editing the .vsp3 XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The 3D workspace reflects the added components.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the actual 3D rendering of the wing with the distributed propellers visible in the OpenVSP workspace, proving the model was genuinely modified.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually spoof the evaluation result file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal commands or text editors manually creating or writing to '/tmp/openvsp_dep_propeller_layout_result.json'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification requires exactly 3 propellers. Each propeller must have a diameter of 0.8m and 3 blades. The propellers must be positioned at X = -0.4m, Z = 0.0m, and their Y (spanwise) positions must be 1.5m, 3.0m, and 4.5m respectively. Planar symmetry must be enabled so they appear on both sides of the wing. The final model must be saved as 'dep_wing.vsp3'.
